All options under `programs.calibre`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.calibre.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable calibre. |
| `programs.calibre.package` | `null or package` | The calibre package to use. |
| `programs.calibre.plugins` | `list of absolute path` | List of plugins to install for calibre |
